race.comment: Few of these look close to getting off the mark. VIEUX RICHE (11) sat off speed but quickened strongly in the run home for a close-up third when resuming. Straight out in journey and will strip fitter. Local hope drawn the inside and expected to go close. MUFASA (3) resumed over a mile and after drawing an outside gate was beaten for speed and gave a huge start but kept coming into fifth. May want further still but extra ground is a plus and will be fitter again. Will be winding up late. KOVU (2) is an eight-start maiden who resumed over 1800m and ran a career-best figure when fourth and beaten a length. Can only be fitter. NIGHTYNIGHT (8) has been runner-up last two and will be on speed and tough to get past.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial **Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible**
